system.description:
### Tier 1 Minion A fragile, bipedal security robot programmed for mass deployment. They march forward firing indiscriminately. Motives & Tactics: Overwhelm, obey protol, suppress

#### Features Minion (5): This adversary is defeated when it takes any damage. For every 5 points of damage dealt to it beyond the first, defeat another LOKI Mech within range.

Group Attack - Action: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all LOKI Mechs within Close range of them. They make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 3 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

Suppressive Fire - Reaction: When you make a successful Group Attack with at least 3 LOKI Mechs, spend a Fear to make their target Restrained.

}}

{{adversary,
